Pour 1 1/4 cups of freshly boiled water over the tea itself. Steep for 5 minutes. Fill a serving pitcher with 1/4 cold water. Certifications like GMP, combined with claims of no fillers and herbicide/pesticide-free ingredients, justify a mid-to-premium price point. The brand’s emphasis on purity and potency supports its premium positioning, though affordability is also highlighted in marketing.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Damtuh Korean Traditional Jujube Tea Plus, Jujube Powder, Red Date Instant Tea, 15g x 50 Sticks
Bullet Point 1: Naturally Sweet Flavor – Enjoy the naturally sweet, date-like taste and fruity aroma of Jujube Powder Tea, offering a comforting and indulgent experience.
Bullet Point 2: Promotes Well-being – Made from the powdered form of jujube fruit, this tea is designed to support a balanced, healthy life with each sip.
Bullet Point 3: Nutrient-Rich – Packed with essential nutrients, including vitamins, minerals, and dietary fiber, making it a nourishing addition to your daily routine.
Bullet Point 4: How to Enjoy – Place 15 grams of the powder in a cup, add 90 ml of hot water, and stir until dissolved. For a smoother and richer experience, mix 1-2 sticks with 150-200 ml of warm milk instead
Bullet Point 5: HACCP Certified & Made in Korea – Produced under the HACCP food safety system, ensuring quality and cleanliness, and crafted with care to reflect Korea’s tea heritage.

Pricing is likely influenced by the product’s niche appeal, ingredient sourcing, and perceived wellness benefits rather than luxury positioning.

Product Description: MORE Fruit, LESS Packaging! Crispy Green is committed to greater sustainability through improved packaging and supporting key environmental initiatives. One way we're doing that is by adding more fruit to our bags—more fruit, less packaging! Our single-serving bags, on average, hold 53% MORE fruit in each bag.
